km.England: ប្រទេសអង់គ្លេស

zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard de Ashton VII於1273年出生時，他的父親Richard Ashton VI18歲，母親Rose Throssell14歲。他和Anabilla de Rode de Aston至少有1個兒子。他去世於1345年享年72歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard de Ashton VII于1273年出生时，他的父亲Richard Ashton VI18岁，母亲Rose Throssell14岁。他和Anabilla de Rode de Aston至少有1个儿子。他去世于1345年享年72岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Ashton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places so called, especially Ashton-under-Lyne near Manchester. Most are named from Old English æsc ‘ash tree’ + tūn ‘settlement’; the one in Northamptonshire is (æt thǣm) æscum ‘(at the) ash trees’. Others have been assimilated to this from different sources. The one in Devon is ‘the settlement (tūn) of Æschere’, while the one in Hertfordshire is ‘the settlement of Ælli’.

variants.name: Aspden
meanings: English: habitational name from Aspden (alias Aspen) in Oswaldtwistle, Lancashire. This surname has been confused with   Ashton   and   Austin  , and probably also with   Aston   and   Astin  , all of which are common surnames in Lancashire.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Richard de Ashton VII was born in 1273, his father, Richard Ashton VI, was 18 and his mother, Rose Throssell, was 14. He had at least 1 son with Anabilla de Rode de Aston. He died in 1345, at the age of 72.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard de Ashton VII est né en 1273, son père, Richard Ashton VI, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Rose Throssell, avait 14 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Anabilla de Rode de Aston. Il est décédé en 1345, à l’âge de 72 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard de Ashton VII 1273 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard Ashton VI 18 und seine Mutter Rose Throssell 14. Er hatte mit Anabilla de Rode de Aston mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1345 im Alter von 72 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard de Ashton VII è nato il nel 1273, il suo padre, Richard Ashton VI, aveva 18 anni e il suo madre, Rose Throssell, aveva 14 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Anabilla de Rode de Aston. Morì nel 1345, all'età di 72 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard de Ashton VIIが1273年に生まれた時，父Richard Ashton VIは18歳，母Rose Throssellは14歳であった。彼はAnabilla de Rode de Astonとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1345年に72歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard de Ashton VII(이)가 1273년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Ashton VI(은)는 18세였고, 그의 어머니 Rose Throssell(은)는 14세였다. 그는 Anabilla de Rode de Aston(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1345년 72세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard de Ashton VII nasceu em 1273, seu pai, Richard Ashton VI, tinha 18 anos e sua mãe, Rose Throssell, tinha 14 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Anabilla de Rode de Aston. Ele faleceu em 1345, com 72 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard de Ashton VII родился в 1273 г., его отцу по имени Richard Ashton VI было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Rose Throssell, 14. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Anabilla de Rode de Aston. Он умер в 1345 г. в возрасте 72 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard de Ashton VII nació en 1273, su papá, Richard Ashton VI, tenía 18 años y su mamá, Rose Throssell, tenía 14 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Anabilla de Rode de Aston. Murió en 1345, a la edad de 72 años.
